articles.author: Joe James
articles.title: How the Gold Coast Became the New Home of Australia's Wealthy
articles.description: Queensland recorded 35,000 net interstate migrants in 2025. A measurable share, including a disproportionate cohort of high-net-worth buyers, settled on the Gold Coast. The data behind Australia's quiet wealth migration.
articles.content: A decade ago the Gold Coast was a tourism postcard. Today it is the destination of choice for Australia's high-net-worth households, and the numbers tell a story of permanent migration that has remad… [+12194 chars]
